title: drosera prophylla
intro: Drosera prophylla, also known as Sundew, is a carnivorous plant that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting insects, which it obtains by producing sticky droplets on its leaves. Traditionally, the Sundew plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to ease congestion and soothe irritated airways. Drosera prophylla can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of tinctures, teas, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
